runTitle: v8.11.59 Vercel Playwright DISK Threshold Fresh Slot Recheck
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production /api/health?service=ai returns status ok with backend cloud-run
Fresh dashboard navigation loads Vercel static OTel 14:50 KST slot 89/143
Dashboard Top 5 resource warnings show db-mysql-dc1-backup DISK 69%, db-mysql-dc1-primary DISK 65%, storage-nfs-dc1-02 DISK 60%
AI sidebar opens with AI Engine Ready
New chat clears previous conversation before dispatch
70% threshold query submitted through UI only and POST /api/ai/jobs returns 201
70% threshold EventSource stream completes via Performance API evidence
70% threshold final answer matches dashboard slot 89: DISK >=70% servers 0대
65% positive threshold probe submitted through UI only and POST /api/ai/jobs returns 201
65% positive threshold EventSource stream completes via Performance API evidence
65% positive threshold final answer includes db-mysql-dc1-backup 69% and db-mysql-dc1-primary 65%
65% positive threshold final answer excludes storage-nfs-dc1-02 DISK 60%
Playwright screenshot captures dashboard Top 5 and final AI answer
QA baseline reviewed before recording: active gate warnings none; open expert gap ai-quality-assurance from QA-20260429-0365
skippedSurfaces: Cloud Tasks high-volume load test - intentionally skipped to preserve free-tier budget
Broad landing/login/modal route sweep - unchanged by this targeted AI grounding recheck
Long-running >60s SSE reconnect scenario - not required for this deterministic threshold regression recheck

expertAssessments.rationale: The fresh-slot production recheck verified deterministic DISK threshold grounding: the 70% query correctly returned 0 servers for slot 89, and the 65% positive probe included only the 69% and 65% dashboard servers while excluding the 60% server.
Vercel health, Cloud Run health proxy, POST /api/ai/jobs 201, and EventSource completion confirmed the production async job path is operational.
The run used a fresh Vercel navigation, UI-only CSRF-safe submission, Performance API EventSource evidence, and durable screenshot/summary artifacts.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after targeted production AI QA; effective $18.4121, billed $0.0000, no unexpected billed usage.

artifacts.label: Fresh slot DISK threshold answer screenshot
Fresh slot DISK threshold QA summary

completedImprovements.title: AI async job answer preserves DISK threshold and dashboard metric values
completedImprovements.evidence: Fresh slot 89 dashboard Top 5 showed DISK 69%, 65%, and 60%. The 70% query returned 0 servers; the 65% query returned only 69% and 65%, excluding 60%.
completedImprovements.note: This rechecks and closes the QA-20260429-0365 ai-quality-assurance grounding gap for v8.11.59 production.

notes: A reused browser before fresh navigation showed clock 14:50 with dashboard slot 14:40, which can create a false UI-vs-AI mismatch across 10-minute slot boundaries. The recorded run used fresh navigation and slot 89.

The 65% positive threshold answer was numerically correct but its footer displayed '일반 대화 응답'. This is recorded as a non-gating metadata observation and aligns with existing metadata-display debt, not the QA-0365 grounding failure.
EventSource streams are captured via the Performance API because browser_network_requests lists POST /api/ai/jobs but not the SSE stream entries.
